thinking_toggle: chat_template_kwargs.enable_thinking (true=on / false=off); reasoning returned in reasoning_content
server_cmdline: llama-server -m /models/Qwen3.6-27B-UD-Q8_K_XL.gguf -ngl 99 -c 262144 --parallel 1 -t 8 -sm layer -ts 1/1 -ctk q8_0 -ctv q8_0 -fa on -b 4096 -ub 1024 --jinja --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8080 --metrics --temp 0.7 --top-p 0.8 --top-k 20 --presence-penalty 1.5 --min-p 0.0 -a qwen3.6-27b
max_tokens_policy: per-prompt cap (default 8192 thinking-on / 2048 off; long_context uses each prompt's value); clamped to fit n_ctx=262144
